subject: refactor(content): extract shared TextStyleControls, improve freeform UX
body:
Six improvements to the multi-block freeform text implementation:

1. Auto-create first block: FreeformCellEditor creates a block via useEffect
   when cell is empty, so users can type immediately without clicking "Add"
2. Single-block simplicity: hide #N label and move up/down buttons when only
   one block exists — cleaner for the common case
3. Delete confirmation timeout: 3-second fallback timer alongside onBlur, since
   blur fires unreliably on mobile touch devices
4. Focused toolbar: markdown formatting toolbar only renders when the block's
   textarea is focused, reducing repeated chrome with 3+ blocks
5. Shared TextStyleControls: extracted identical style panel (align, color, size,
   bold/italic, spacing, spacer/line) used by both TextElementEditor and
   FreeformBlockEditor — eliminates ~150 lines of duplicated JSX
6. Icon components: GearIcon, CloseIcon, ChevronUpIcon, ChevronDownIcon extracted
   as named components, replacing repeated inline SVG path strings

Tags: text, freeform, content, refactor, ux
